resources.name: LLM OKF — Open Knowledge Format
resources.description: OKF as a RAG replacement: structured markdown knowledge base, deterministic navigation, no vector DB

resources.name: Knowledge Base
resources.description: Inspect and manage the OKF knowledge base

resources.name: Chat — OKF Query
resources.description: Ask a question. OKF navigator reads index.md, selects relevant files, LLM answers with full context. No vector DB.

resources.name: Chat — Local LLM Setup Query
resources.description: Ask about local LLM setup. Tests navigation to concepts/local-llm-setup.md

resources.name: Chat — Spring AI Query
resources.description: Ask about Spring AI. Tests navigation to concepts/spring-ai-overview.md

resources.name: Chat — Stream (SSE)
resources.description: Same as chat but streams tokens via Server-Sent Events

resources.name: Get OKF Index
resources.description: Returns the master index.md — the navigation file agents read first

resources.name: List All OKF Files
resources.description: Returns all OKF markdown files with parsed frontmatter metadata

resources.name: Ingest PDF
resources.description: Upload a PDF file. It is read, converted to OKF markdown with YAML frontmatter, and saved as a reference file.

resources.name: Swagger UI
resources.description: Open Swagger UI in browser at http://localhost:8090/swagger-ui.html
